title: Dreams Again
lyrics: At night I've been sleeping too long Now I'm letting my mind turn on I can't get the rest I need to make myself feel better And I can't get the rest I need Dreams, if they fall you can see Dreams, are they really for a team? At night I keep chasing thoughts and worry about the life that I call this disaster Calm down, I don't know which way to grade me But it's probably only negative if I'm really being true I gotta know better than that If I'm gonna move past anything in this existence If I'm gonna be better than I can find resistance in the competition that we all go through I wanna find the gratitude, be there for you too and me, myself And maybe we can add more into our family, our life and be different and find ourselves Dreaming again, dreaming again About the things we wanted in the beginning When we took this drive down our little course At the sideways of normal baby we can still behave It doesn't have to be this do or die, yeah So we can dream again, dream again Fall asleep in comfort and hold each other tight As we dream again, dream again And I will be dreaming and dreaming and dreaming of different times Cause what dream is right for you is not right for me Is it different particles of family that make us stay here And emotionally entangled, the other one because we just don't want to Go one more day without that touch, without the love that makes me sore Come on, find that calming ground and close your eyes for more Baby we'll dream again, sing again Come on, dream my friend www.mooji.org

lyricsSegments.text: At night I've been sleeping too long Now I'm letting my mind turn on
I can't get the rest I need to make myself feel better
And I can't get the rest I need
Dreams, if they fall you can see
Dreams, are they really for a team?
At night I keep chasing thoughts and worry about the life that I call this disaster
Calm down, I don't know which way to grade me
But it's probably only negative if I'm really being true
I gotta know better than that
If I'm gonna move past anything in this existence
If I'm gonna be better than I can find resistance in the competition that we all go through
I wanna find the gratitude, be there for you too and me, myself
And maybe we can add more into our family, our life and be different and find ourselves
Dreaming again, dreaming again
About the things we wanted in the beginning
When we took this drive down our little course
At the sideways of normal baby we can still behave
It doesn't have to be this do or die, yeah
So we can dream again, dream again
Fall asleep in comfort and hold each other tight
As we dream again, dream again
And I will be dreaming and dreaming and dreaming of different times
Cause what dream is right for you is not right for me
Is it different particles of family that make us stay here
And emotionally entangled, the other one because we just don't want to
Go one more day without that touch, without the love that makes me sore
Come on, find that calming ground and close your eyes for more
Baby we'll dream again, sing again
Come on, dream my friend
www.mooji.org
